LanguageData.CMC_GunColorPickerDesciption: You can customise CeleTech weapons' camouflage color by clicking a color and a pawn equipping a CeleTech gun as main weapon.\nsome weapons are not customisable.
LanguageData.MessageMustSelectCMCGun: select PAWN equipped with CeleTech weapon
LanguageData.Message_AESASetUp: The deployment of the "Kunlun" AESA radar is complete, and the anti-tank missile turret will gain automatic attack capability.
LanguageData.Message_Destroyed: The "Kunlun" AESA radar has been shut down, and the anti-tank missile turret will lose its automatic attack capability.
LanguageData.StatEnergyWeaponDMG_Text: damage caused by an energy pulse:{0}\n
LanguageData.StatShootNum_Text: Salvo size of this mounted weapon is{0}, ammo consumption is also multiplies by this value.
LanguageData.Message_MissileLostTarget: A missile lost its intended target.
LanguageData.Message_CMC_TraderCantLanded: UTS is unable to land, leaving. You need at least one powered and cleared landing platform.
LanguageData.Stat_CMCDMGDrange_Text: Projectile damage and penetration attenuation starts from:{0}\nDamage: Inverse-square decay\nPenetration: Inverse-cube decay
LanguageData.CMC.ScanMapDesc: Utilizes Kunlun radar to illuminate designated AO, enabling long-range artillery and cruise missiles to autonomously engage hostile targets within the zone.
LanguageData.CMC.ScanMapStopDescDefault: Radar illumination terminated in current AO.
LanguageData.CMC_Targeting: Kunlun radar providing real-time fire control data for AO {0}. Hostile target tracking active.
LanguageData.CMC_TargetingDefault: Kunlun radar providing real-time fire control data for current AO. Hostile target tracking active.
LanguageData.CMC.ScanMapFailed: Fire control request denied. Non-hostile faction signature detected in AO. IFF verification failed.
LanguageData.CMC_CommandTargetMapFromWorld: switch to Low-Voltage Direct Fire Mode
LanguageData.CMC_CommandTarggetMapFromWorldDesc: Current: Indirect Fire (attacks radar-locked map tile targets). After switching: Attacks in-map targets.\n\nMagnetic rails fully charged to accelerate projectiles to first cosmic velocity. Turret cooling and auto-loading systems operating at full power.
LanguageData.CMC_CommandTargetWorldFromMap: switch to High-Voltage Indirect Fire Mode
LanguageData.CMC_CommandTarggetWorldFromMapDesc: Current: Direct Fire (attacks in-map targets). After switching: Attacks radar-locked map tile targets.\n\nMagnetic rails partially charged. All turret subsystems operating in low-power mode.
LanguageData.CMC_CommandTargetWorldFromMap: Switch to Low-Voltage Direct Fire Mode
LanguageData.CMC_CommandTarggetWorldFromMapDesc: Current: Indirect Fire (attacks radar-locked map tile targets). After switching: Attacks in-map targets.\n\nMagnetic rails fully charged. All turret subsystems operating in high-power mode.
LanguageData.WeaponModificationBench_InstallAccessory: Install an accessory onto the placed weapon.
LanguageData.WeaponModificationBench_UninstallWeaponD: Retrieve the weapon from the bench.
LanguageData.WeaponModificationBench_AccessoryGone: The accessory is missing or was destroyed.
LanguageData.CMC_OpenTradeInfoDesc: View accumulated points and access the points shop.
LanguageData.CMC_TradeGreeting: Hello, {0}. What services do you require?
LanguageData.CMC_PurchaseSuccessDropPod: Purchased {0} is being drop-podded to the colony.
LanguageData.CMC_SupplyShuttleDesc: Call a shuttle carrying various random supplies.
LanguageData.CMC_ArsenalShuttleDesc: Call a shuttle carrying various weapons.
LanguageData.CMC_PaidEarlyCall: Paid {0} silver to call the shuttle early.
LanguageData.CMC_CallSupportPlaceholder: Call Support Page (Placeholder)\n(This page is separate from the trade system)
LanguageData.CMC_TradeGreeting_1: Phew... finally connected. For you {0}, this power drain is worth it! Come and take a look.
LanguageData.CMC_TradeGreeting_2: Directive received: Activate the "Cutest" trade protocol. Goods listed. Please feed me with shiny silver~
LanguageData.CMC_TradeGreeting_3: Ah... Hello {0}. Hope I didn't mix in any weird stuff into the product list while I was dozing off...
LanguageData.CMC_TradeGreeting_4: Trade interface, activate! ...Was that activation not cool enough? Whatever, the stuff is good!
LanguageData.CMC_TradeGreeting_5: Premium customer signal detected! Is that you, {0}? Both my logic core and mood core recommend this transaction!
LanguageData.CMC_TradeGreeting_6: Good morning... or evening? It's always business hours in my server! Wanna take a look?
LanguageData.CMC_TradeGreeting_7: Ding! Your exclusive trade AI is online, complete with today's dose of sass~ Ready to browse my curated selection?
LanguageData.CMC_TradeGreeting_8: Hmm... Calculations indicate that trading with {0} will boost my "Happiness Index" by 37% today! So, come on, take a look!
LanguageData.CMC_TradeComplete: Trade complete. {0} points deducted. Cargo inbound.
LanguageData.CMC_Airstrike_ACDesc: Low-altitude strike run using cannon strafing on the designated area.
LanguageData.CMC_AirstrikeDesc: Low-altitude strike run delivering multiple unguided rockets for area saturation.
LanguageData.CMC_ATGMStrikeDesc: Launches two HJ-53 anti-tank missiles at the designated target.
LanguageData.CMC_ATGM_LStrikeDesc: Launches an HJ-57 heavy anti-tank missile at the designated target.
LanguageData.CMC_PrecisionEMPStrikeDesc: Drops an LS-9E 500kg EMP guided bomb at the designated location, disabling electronics and shields.
LanguageData.CMC_PrecisionStrikeDesc: Drops an LS-9 500kg high-explosive guided bomb at the designated location.
LanguageData.CMC_CooldownRemaining: Sortied aircraft is returning to attack route, remaining: {0}
LanguageData.CMC_RearmingRemaining: Sortied aircraft is rearming on carrier, remaining: {0}
LanguageData.CMC_HangarLineExecuting: #{0} Executing {1} | Remaining waves {2} | Return route {3} | Fuel {4} h
LanguageData.CMC_NoAircraftForThisLoadout: No idle aircraft and no remaining charges for this loadout
LanguageData.CMC_NoCharges: No available ammo charges. Please wait for rearm.
LanguageData.CMC_AttackGreeting_1: Great, Ba Ta Meng Shang Shi!
LanguageData.CMC_AttackGreeting_2: Service request received. Please confirm target coordinates, Commander {0}.
LanguageData.CMC_AttackGreeting_3: Firepower package is ready. Connecting you to the "Rapid Solution", Commander {0}.
LanguageData.CMC_AttackGreeting_4: Target confirmed. Executing "Customer Satisfaction" enhancement protocol.
LanguageData.CMC_AttackGreeting_5: Commander {0}, our automated assault carrier CSS-Lanling has entered orbit and is launching fighters, preparing to engage in the combat zone.
LanguageData.CMC_AttackGreeting_6: "Troubleshooting" service is online. Awaiting final execution command, Commander {0}.
LanguageData.CMC_AttackGreeting_7: Warning: Preparing to implement "Aggressive Negotiation" tactics. Shall we demand an answer from the enemies invading our base, Commander {0}?
LanguageData.CMC_AttackGreeting_8: Initiating final solution... Plotting close air support routes, calculating orbital strike trajectories...
LanguageData.CMC_AttackGreeting_9: Sun Tzu said: Warfare is a matter of orbital supremacy!
LanguageData.CMC_AttackGreeting_10: Close air support is on station in the combat zone, ready to execute ground strike missions at your command, Commander {0}.
LanguageData.TOT_Sustain_DamageDesc: Damage applied each time the laser hits.
LanguageData.TOT_Sustain_APDesc: The armor penetration of the laser.
LanguageData.TOT_Sustain_SecAPDesc: The armor penetration of the secondary damage.
LanguageData.TOT_Sustain_ScatterDesc: This laser can scatter on impact.
LanguageData.TOT_Sustain_ScatterExplosionDesc: Damage dealt by each scattered projectile.
LanguageData.TOT_TraderShuttleArrivalText: A trade shuttle named {0} has landed nearby and is ready for trade.
LanguageData.TOT_ProjType_Standard_Desc: A standard kinetic projectile affected by gravity and wind.
LanguageData.TOT_ProjType_Piercing_Desc: A high-velocity round capable of penetrating multiple targets and projectile interceptors.
LanguageData.TOT_ProjType_Guided_Desc: A projectile equipped with guidance systems to track moving targets.
LanguageData.TOT_ProjType_Laser_Desc: A continuous beam of high-energy output. Hits instantly, accurately and ignore projectile interceptors.
A instant beam of high-energy output. Hits instantly, accurately and ignore projectile interceptors.
LanguageData.TOT_AutoReleaseStarted: Auto-release started. Funnels will be deployed automatically.
LanguageData.TOT_CannotStartAutoRelease: Cannot start auto-release. Check if drones are available and plan is set.
LanguageData.TOT_AutoAttackToggled: Auto attack mode toggled for all funnels.
LanguageData.TOT_ForcedAttackCancelled: Forced attack cancelled for all funnels.
LanguageData.TOT_CommandAutoAttackDesc: Toggle autonomous attack mode for funnels.
LanguageData.TOT_CommandTargetAttackDesc: Command all deployed funnels to attack a target.
LanguageData.TOT_CommandCancelAttackDesc: Cancel forced attack and return to following mode.
LanguageData.TOT_AllDronesDeployed: All loaded drones have been deployed.
LanguageData.TOT_NoFunnelsAttacking: No funnels in forced attack mode.
LanguageData.TOT_Camo_NoAccessoriesFound: No accessories found in nearby cabinets.
LanguageData.TOT_Laser_RangeDesc: The effective range of the weapon.
LanguageData.TOT_Laser_SecAPDesc: The armor penetration of the secondary damage.
LanguageData.TOT_Laser_ScatterEffectDesc: This laser can scatter on impact.
LanguageData.TOT_Laser_ScatterExpDamageDesc: Damage dealt by each scattered projectile.
LanguageData.TOT_Laser_DivideEffectDesc: This laser can divide to hit additional cells.
LanguageData.TOT_Laser_DivideRadiusDesc: The radius within which the laser hits additional cells.
LanguageData.TOT_Laser_APDesc: The armor penetration of the laser.
LanguageData.TOT_Sustain_DPSDesc: Theoretical damage per second based on {0} damage every {1} ticks.
LanguageData.TOT_Sustain_IntervalDesc: Time between damage ticks: {0} ticks ({1} seconds).
LanguageData.TOT_Sustain_SecAPDesc: Armor penetration of the secondary damage.
LanguageData.TOT_Sustain_ScatterExplosionDesc: Damage and type of the scatter explosion.
LanguageData.TOT_Laser_RangeDesc: The effective range of the weapon.
LanguageData.WeaponModificationBench_UninstallWeaponD: Remove the currently held weapon from the bench.
LanguageData.TOT_AllFunnelsRecalled: All funnels have returned to the carrier.
LanguageData.TOT_ForcedAttackCancelled: Forced attack cancelled. Returning to follow mode.
LanguageData.TOT_CommandReleaseAllDesc: Instantly release all available funnels from the pack.
LanguageData.TOT_CommandRecallAllDesc: Order all deployed funnels to return to the carrier.
LanguageData.TOT_CommandToggleModeDesc: Toggle between Assault (hunt enemies freely) and Escort (protect carrier) modes.\n\nCurrent Mode: {0}
LanguageData.TOT_CommandTargetAttackDesc: Command all funnels to attack a specific target.\n\nNote: Cannot target allies, self, or own funnels.
LanguageData.TOT_CommandCancelAttackDesc: Cancel the forced attack command and return to the selected mode behavior.
LanguageData.TOT_CommandAutoDraftDesc: Toggle automatic behavior:\nON: Automatically release all funnels when drafted, and recall when undrafted.\nOFF: Manual control only.
LanguageData.CMC_ImportNearbyWeapon_Desc: Opens a window listing all modifiable or paintable weapons within a 9-cell radius. Selecting a weapon will instantly mount it onto the bench.
LanguageData.CMC_NoModifiableWeaponsFound: No modifiable weapons found within 9 cells.
LanguageData.TOT_WeaponShatteredText: Auxiliary coil overload detonated the heat sinks and weapon capacitors. The {1} equipped by {0} could not withstand the load and has shattered!
LanguageData.CMC_CompatibleDescription: This weapon accepts the following accessories:
LanguageData.CMC_MaxSlotsDesc: The maximum number of accessories that can be mounted on this weapon simultaneously.
LanguageData.CMC_FunnelCapacityDesc: The maximum number of funnels this unit can hold.
LanguageData.CMC_FunnelTypesDesc: This unit is configured to deploy the following models:
LanguageData.TOT_AltFire_ProjectileDesc: The projectile fired in alternative fire mode.
LanguageData.TOT_AltFire_DamageDesc: The amount of damage dealt by the alternative fire mode.
LanguageData.TOT_AltFire_ExplosionRadiusDesc: The explosion radius of the alternative fire mode projectile.
LanguageData.TOT_AltFire_APDesc: The armor penetration capability of the alternative fire mode.
LanguageData.TOT_AltFire_RangeDesc: The maximum range of the alternative fire mode.
LanguageData.TOT_AltFire_WarmupDesc: The time required to aim before firing the alternative fire mode.
LanguageData.TOT_AltFire_BurstCountDesc: The number of shots fired in a single burst when using the alternative fire mode.
LanguageData.TOT_AltFire_CooldownDesc: The cooldown time required after firing the alternative fire mode.
LanguageData.CMC_ToggleAutoSwapTip: Toggle Auto-Swap: Automatically equip weapon when reloaded.
LanguageData.CMC_PS_LimitReached: Reached purchase limit for this item
LanguageData.CMC_SecondaryDamage_Desc: On penetration, deals an additional {0} {1} damage{2}.
